item.title: G&L Legacy LEFTY USA electric guitar strat style with case - $1,200 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed G&L strat, in outstanding condition. pots modified to function in right handed direction (clockwise-increase, i believe). includes hard case. includes tremolo arm. no trades, thank you.

item.title: Eastman E20DL acoustic guitar dreadnought rosewood spruce lefty w/case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed eastman acoustic, with hardshell case. no trades.

item.title: Eastman T386 electric guitar semi-hollow lefty with hard case - $1,000 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed 335-type semi-hollow guitar from eastman. hard case included. no pickguard. sounds great, no trades, thank you.

item.title: Gretsch G6119 Tennessee Rose Lefty electric guitar Japan with case - $1,999 (Quincy)
item.description: Left handed Gretsch Tennesee Rose with bigsby. This guitar has been thoroughly gigged for over fifteen years. Had a professional fret level and dress, along with a pinned bridge (no longer free floating). Pickups upgraded to TV Jones Classic filtertrons. Original hardshell case included. No trades.

item.title: Lefty Left Handed Lyx Pro 'Jerry Garcia Alligator' Lol Guitar & Amp - $175 (Asbury Park)
item.description: Cheapo Left Handed Lyx Pro with sticker set made to look like Jerry Garcia's 'Alligator' guitar (1971-73) of which the custom repro in the Fender Custom shop costs 20 grand look it up. It's actually a pretty decent guitar and amp considering the economy quality of it I was surprised. Comes with gig bag and practice amp as pictured. Asking $175 or BEST OFFER*! . Perfect for a beginner or a Deadhead who'd dig a knock around knock off. New condition hardly used selling to get another new guitar. mV¸

item.title: Yamaha lefty acoustic guitar (FG720SL) - $300 (West Hempstead)
item.description: If you are a lefty guitarist (or aspiring guitarist) looking for a great value on a quality instrument this might be what you are after.

item.title: MARTIN Backpacker Guitar, Lefty LEFT HANDED - $190 (Holbrook)
item.description: MARTIN Backpacker Guitar, Lefty LEFT HANDED. Comes with gig bag (even has a pocket) and strap.

item.title: 1980 Lefty Guild D40C with K&K Pickup - $1,100 (Murray Hill)
item.description: 1980 Guild D40C (Left-Handed), rare cutaway model, solid condition with play wear consistent with a player guitar of this vintage, string action is excellent (3/64" to 4/64" high E to Low E at the 12th fret - saddle height is 1/8"), equipped with a K&K Pure Mini bridge plate transducer pickup, sturdy hardshell case with locking keys, $1,100.

item.title: FENDER LEFTY - $800 (Boston Ma.)
item.description: Mint Condition 6 string Lefty also music and Guitar parts etc. Jimi Hendrix CDs some rare. (Price will vary on your choice.) Some CDs have one to a case others have 2 or 3CDs

item.title: Eastman SB59 left handed electric guitar with case - $1,300 (Quincy)
item.description: lefty eastman les paul in great shape. includes case. no trades.

item.title: Eastman T59/TV-RD left handed semi-hollow electric guitar - $1,600 (Quincy)
item.description: this is the higher end lefty Eastman 335-style offering, comes relic'd from the factory. includes original case. no trades.

item.title: Agile AL-3100MCC Black P90 lefty wolfetone pickup upgrade with case - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed single cutaway agile guitar with upgraded Wolfetone Meaner P90 pickup. includes hard case. no trades.

item.title: left handed Gretch guitar - $300 (south boston)
item.description: Left handed Gretch guitar STRUNG RIGHTY. Sorry, that's the way I learned. The nut is not glued down so you can turn it around and restring it lefty. Great Gretch sound and great condition. Cash only. NO CASE.

item.title: JB Player JBP-165 Left-Handed Electric Guitar Sunburst w/ Whammy bar/t - $160 (WEST ISLIP)
item.description: UP FOR YOUR CONSIDERATION IS THIS ..

item.title: Epiphone Sheraton Left handed electric guitar alnico pickups w/case - $700 (Quincy)
item.description: Rare lefty Korea-era Epiphone Sheraton. Upgraded Alnico II GFS pickups. original hard case included. No trades.

item.title: Ibanez AEG70 Left Handed Acoustic Electric Guitar - $270 (Brooklyn)
item.description: The AEG70L is a left-handed AEG series acoustic/electric guitar model introduced by Ibanez for 2020. This lefty model features a Tiger Burst finish.

item.title: Fender CD-100LF NAT Left Handed Acoustic Guitar + Padded Case - $200 (Brooklyn)
item.description: BRAND NEW SOFT CASE included with backpack straps, back hook, briefcase handle & front zip pouch. Only string that is missing is the high E string (costs $6-10). Any further questions, don't hesitate to reach out. Kept in BEAUTIFUL condition. My first and only guitar. Have a lot more photos. Just ask!

item.title: 1980s Made in Japan Fender Squier Left handed Stratocaster - $950 (Scarsdale)
item.description: 1980s Fender Squier made in Japan

item.title: Left handed 1965 Hagstrom III - Red lefty LH - $900 (williamsburg, brooklyn)
item.description: As a lefty, we all know how hard it is to find guitars that suits us, let alone a real vintage piece at a reasonable price.

item.title: Warrior Custom Built Lefty 4 String Bass - $2,375 (Stratford)
item.description: Price Reduction!!!

item.title: Lefty Fender Kurt Cobain Jaguar - $700 (Salem)
item.description: Left Handed Cobain model Jaguar. Used well, but well cared for besides collecting some dust in recent days.

item.title: washburn D10 SCE lefty acoustic electric - $300 (Brooklyn)
item.description: Lefty left handed .

item.title: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich All-black-hardware - $750 (Bushwick)
item.description: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich

item.title: Martin x series left-handed plus free right-handed backpacker guitar - $300 (New York)
item.description: Lefty Martin has some miles on it. It's still very playable. I'm throwing in a backpacker guitar so you can jam with your right-handed pal!

item.title: LEFTY Epiphone SG Standard with hardshell case - $415 (Montpelier)
item.description: It's less than two years old; my son got a new guitar. Clean, plays well. Comes with an Epiphone hardshell case.

item.title: 2 Electronic Guitars & Amps - $125
item.description: Selling a child sized electric guitar and a lefty regular sized guitar, amp and guitar case.

item.title: Left handed guitars for sale Kramer, ESP, Custom LEFTY - $650 (Somerset)
item.description: I have several rare left handed guitars for sale. I am open to partial trades but of course, cash is King.
